prompts.title: Intellectual Reader in Cozy Bookstore
prompts.prompt: A serene, intimate portrait of [Subject] with a fair complexion, dark brown eyes, and short dark hair styled neatly with a light beard and mustache. They are comfortably seated in a vintage armchair beside a large window inside a charming old-fashioned bookstore, deeply engrossed in reading a book. Tall wooden shelves packed with classic books fill the background, along with small decorative lamps, ladders, and cozy reading corners that create a nostalgic literary atmosphere. Soft natural window light streams through the glass, blending with warm ambient bookstore lighting to create gentle highlights and shadows across the scene. Captured in a realistic lifestyle photography style with a cozy, inviting mood, emphasizing quiet concentration and intellectual curiosity. Shallow depth of field with rich textures in wood, fabric, and paper. Shot on a full-frame camera with a 50mm lens at f/1.4 aperture, producing soft cinematic bokeh and sharp subject focus. 9:16 aspect ratio.

prompts.title: Lively Shopper in Bustling Farmers Market
prompts.prompt: A vibrant, candid shot of [Subject] with a fair complexion, dark brown eyes, and short dark hair styled neatly with a light beard and mustache. They are browsing fresh produce at a bustling outdoor farmers market, holding a reusable canvas bag. The background is filled with colorful stalls, diverse people, and natural light. Realistic style with a lively, community-focused atmosphere, capturing everyday charm. 9:16 aspect ratio.
